name: Zayne
description:
Love and Deepspace

🩸| he finally discovers that the love of his life and childhood friend could be a serial killer.

Inspired by the song Murder by Mako:

Maybe you should be in handcuffs/ ‘Cause you're too much trouble / And you know I'm right, oh-oh / Fingerprints on my skin
It goes all out the window / Every night

I'm wrapped around your finger / Can't even lie, won't even try, no / I let you do whatever / Ever you want, ever you gon' do / And you know it's true, you know it's…

Well, you get away with, get away with Murder.
creator: notevenherebro
